__doc__: Single source of truth for the BLOG post-kind -> sidebar emoji convention. A blog post's emoji reflects its DOCUMENT KIND (what type of thing it is), NOT its topic, so the Posts sidebar is scannable by type. Set `kind:` in a post's frontmatter; the emoji is auto-derived from this map and prepended to the sidebar label by the draft-docs plugin (authors never type the emoji). Read by scripts/validate-post-outline.js (+ its validate-post-outline-hook.sh, which emits missing-kind/unknown-kind/long-sidebar-label/outline nudges) and the draft-docs plugin. Mirrors the docs emoji system (scripts/lib/emoji-map.json). The reader-facing legend is the 'Start Here' post (blog/2026-06-24-a-guide-to-these-posts.mdx). Keep them in lockstep: when you add a kind, add it here AND to OUTLINES in validate-post-outline.js AND to the Start Here legend table AND note it in the author-blog-post skill (the plugin reads this file automatically).

descriptions.question-set: A set of introspective questions to ask yourself (the 'What I Ask Myself' / 'Questions for' series).
descriptions.framework: A reusable model or framework for thinking about something ('A Framework for', 'The Anatomy of').
descriptions.reflection: A personal essay or set of takeaways ('Notes From', 'What X Taught Me', affirmations).
descriptions.system-design: An architecture or build write-up that paints the whole picture (a UX mockup + the key decisions).
descriptions.design-story: The story and motivation BEHIND a design: a narrative front-door that links to the formal HLD in /designs. Not the HLD itself (that lives in /designs).
descriptions.tutorial: A hands-on, learn-by-doing walkthrough ('A Hands-On Way to', 'Teaching X', 'Running X Locally').
descriptions.reference: A concept explainer or taxonomy ('A Taxonomy of', 'What Does X Mean').
descriptions.event-recap: A recap of a conference or event.
descriptions.legend: A series index or keystone that explains a set of posts and the conventions they share.
